title: Repo cleanup: migrate design docs to knowledge, move docs, remove root scripts

comments.author: maxine--plan-050
comments.content: Covers REQ-8, AC-14 through AC-16. Steps: (1) migrate 3 DESIGN-*.md + POLICY-REVIEW.md + ADR.md to knowledge repo, (2) move ARCHITECTURE.md + ELI5.md to docs/, update README links, (3) remove test-*.sh and .plan/, (4) commit .crosslink/rules/ (28 files), (5) clean .gitignore, (6) update LICENSE copyright (2025->2025-2026, holder TBD), (7) update infographic. Must run AFTER all code features merged to avoid conflicts.
